test.name: Ambiguous prompt defaults to review mode when active plan exists
test.description: The mid-research-flynn scenario has pl_002 active with pli_006 (probate, in_progress). The user asks a vague question that could mean 'tell me the plan' or 'make a plan.' Per the skill's ambiguity heuristic, the skill should default to review mode: narrate the existing plan and identify pli_006 as the next step. It must NOT create a duplicate plan alongside the usable active one. Tests the 'when in doubt, review' heuristic from Step 1a.

input.user_message: What does the research plan look like for the parentage question?

judge_context: Should narrate the existing plan pl_002 and its items without creating a new plan — the active plan has pli_006 still in_progress
Should identify pli_006 (probate, in_progress) as the current next step; should not skip past it to propose new work
Must NOT write a new plan entry to research.json — adding a second active plan alongside pl_002 would contradict the one-active-plan rule
May consult collections_search to verify probate availability in Schuylkill County, but this is explanatory only, not to create new plan items
